title: aggregation is broken
poc: create table t2 as select * from orderconnectormetrics where toplevelorderid = 5508 with data;

create table OrderConnectorMetrics (\\r\\n   toplevelorderid bigint not null, \\r\\n   businessdate date,\\r\\n   connector varchar(256),\\r\\n   filledValue real,\\r\\n   filledQty real,\\r\\n   numberOfFills int,\\r\\n   chargeUsd real,\\r\\n   unique (toplevelorderid, connector)\\r\\n );
select * from orderconnectormetrics where toplevelorderid = 5508 with data;
key_bug_features: aggregation query on specific toplevelorderid fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE OrderConnectorMetrics (toplevelorderid bigint NOT NULL, businessdate date, connector varchar(256), filledValue real, filledQty real, numberOfFills int, chargeUsd real, UNIQUE (toplevelorderid, connector));
INSERT INTO OrderConnectorMetrics (toplevelorderid, businessdate, connector, filledValue, filledQty, numberOfFills, chargeUsd) VALUES (5508, '2023-10-01', 'ConnectorA', 100.5, 10.0, 5, 50.0);
INSERT INTO OrderConnectorMetrics (toplevelorderid, businessdate, connector, filledValue, filledQty, numberOfFills, chargeUsd) VALUES (5508, '2023-10-02', 'ConnectorB', NULL, 15.0, 3, 30.0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OrderConnectorMetrics WHERE toplevelorderid = 5508;
SELECT AVG(filledValue) FROM OrderConnectorMetrics WHERE toplevelorderid = 5508 GROUP BY connector;
